_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assess performance of collection assets against prescribed specifications.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data model updates, and deprecation of unused content.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-011 (DG, cosine: 0.405), DQ-T-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.397).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.294). Shared vocabulary: [assets, performance]. DCWF-only terms [against, assess, collection, prescribed, specifications] vs WIDAI-only terms [bi, content, data, deprecation, existing, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.885, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (81.4%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Assess performance of collection assets against prescribed specifications." and "Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data mod". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.447 > STS 0.294 (gap +0.153). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [assets, performance] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [assets, performance]. DCWF-only: [against, assess, collection, prescribed, specifications]. WIDAI-only: [bi, content, data, deprecation, existing, maintain].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 81.4% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.153 with low STS 0.294. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
